prd.oneLiner: Connect job posts, candidate profiles, pipeline stages, interviews and evaluations, offers, and recruiting analytics.
prd.goal: Reduce applicant review lead time by 25% and minimize missed hiring-stage steps.
prd.whyNow: Applications, interview schedules, and feedback are scattered across email and spreadsheets, slowing hiring and harming candidate experience.
prd.problem: Applications, interview schedules, and feedback are scattered across email and spreadsheets, slowing hiring and harming candidate experience.
prd.solution: Connect job posts, candidate profiles, pipeline stages, interviews and evaluations, offers, and recruiting analytics.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Job applicant and hiring team member
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Applications, interview schedules, and feedback are scattered across email and spreadsheets, slowing hiring and harming candidate experience.

targets.name: HR recruiting operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Applications, interview schedules, and feedback are scattered across email and spreadsheets, slowing hiring and harming candidate experience.

scenarios.text: Job applicant and hiring team member completes job posting and application submission and checks progress.
HR recruiting operations coordinator reviews recruitment funnel, time-to-hire, and source-performance reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce applicant review lead time by 25% and minimize missed hiring-stage steps.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Resume review, interview scheduling, evaluation, and offer handling
Recruitment funnel, time-to-hire, and source-performance reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
